# Repos to exclude from auto-discovery.
#
# Format: one `owner/name` per line, case-insensitive. `#` starts a comment.
# Add a repo here if it keeps showing up in search results but is spam,
# abandoned, off-topic, or otherwise should never be auto-added.
#
# Example:
#   some-spammer/claude-skill-xyz   # auto-generated junk
